name: Deliverr (Flexport) E-Commerce Fulfillment API
what_it_does: Deliverr (acquired by Flexport, previously by Shopify in 2022, then sold to Flexport) e-commerce fulfillment REST API for distributed inventory, fast-shipping fulfillment, and marketplace badge fulfillment. Enables AI agents to manage distributed inventory allocation across fulfillment network for optimized shipping zone coverage, handle order creation and multi-channel fulfillment routing for e-commerce order automation, access inbound shipping plan creation for inventory replenishment automation, retrieve real-time inventory levels and storage utilization for stock management automation, manage fast-tag badge eligibility for marketplace (Amazon, Walmart, eBay) fulfillment badge qualification, handle returns processing and restocking for reverse logistics automation, access shipping cost estimation for fulfillment cost modeling, retrieve order status and tracking for post-purchase communication automation, manage product bundle and kit creation for assembled SKU fulfillment, and integrate with Shopify, BigCommerce, Amazon Seller Central, Walmart Marketplace, and eBay for omnichannel fulfillment.
use_cases: Optimizing fulfillment network from inventory distribution agents
Qualifying marketplace badges from fast-shipping agents
Fulfilling multi-channel orders from commerce agents
Managing inbound inventory from replenishment agents
not_for: Cold chain and regulated product fulfillment
Large enterprise DC operations (use Manhattan Associates or Blue Yonder)
best_when: A DTC or marketplace seller wanting AI agents to automate distributed inventory placement, fast-shipping fulfillment, marketplace badge qualification (Walmart 2-day, eBay Fast 'N Free), and multi-channel order routing through the Flexport/Deliverr network.
avoid_when: SHOPIFY-TO-FLEXPORT ACQUISITION CHAIN API UNCERTAINTY: Deliverr was acquired by Shopify in May 2022, then sold to Flexport in October 2023 along with Shopify Logistics; API surface, branding, and feature roadmap have undergone multiple ownership transitions; verify current Flexport fulfillment API stability and Deliverr brand continuity before long-term automation investment. MARKETPLACE BADGE ELIGIBILITY ALGORITHM CHANGES: Automated marketplace badge qualification (Walmart 2-day, eBay Fast 'N Free) depends on Deliverr/Flexport shipping performance metrics that marketplaces can recalculate; automated merchant badge display based on Deliverr eligibility may become stale if marketplace recalculates eligibility; implement regular eligibility refresh. INBOUND SHIPPING PLAN ACCURACY FOR INVENTORY FORECASTING: Automated inbound shipping plan creation must use accurate velocity and seasonality data; automated overshipping creates storage fee exposure; automated undershipping creates stockout and missed marketplace badge due to insufficient network coverage.

auth.notes: Deliverr/Flexport fulfillment uses API key and OAuth authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ (Flexport, Inc.). Deliverr founded 2017 by Harish Abbott and Michael Krakaris. Acquired by Shopify May 2022 for ~$2.1B. Sold to Flexport October 2023 along with Shopify Logistics. Flexport is a global freight forwarding and logistics platform. Deliverr brand continues under Flexport for fulfillment. Distributed US fulfillment network with marketplace badge specialization. Competes with ShipBob, ShipMonk, and Amazon FBA for e-commerce fulfillment.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-order fulfillment and storage fees
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-order fulfillment, storage, and receiving fees; fast-shipping premium for 2-day and next-day tiers; inbound shipping plan fees
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Flexport subsidiary (ex-Shopify). Deliverr founded 2017. Acquired Shopify 2022, Flexport 2023. Distributed US fulfillment. Per-order usage pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; order submission and inventory queries throttled; webhooks for order and fulfillment events

known_agent_gotchas: MULTIPLE OWNERSHIP TRANSITIONS REDUCE API STABILITY CONFIDENCE: Deliverr has been through Shopify acquisition (2022) and Flexport sale (2023) in rapid succession; API documentation, endpoints, and branding reflect this transition history; validate current active API documentation source (Flexport vs legacy Deliverr) before automation implementation

MARKETPLACE BADGE ELIGIBILITY REFRESH REQUIRED: Deliverr marketplace badge qualification (Walmart 2-day, eBay Fast 'N Free) is recalculated by marketplaces periodically based on performance metrics; automated product listing badge display must refresh eligibility status regularly rather than assuming static eligibility

INBOUND NETWORK PLACEMENT OPTIMIZATION REQUIRES VELOCITY DATA: Automated inbound shipping plan creation using Deliverr's distributed network placement recommendations requires accurate product velocity (units/day) and seasonality input; automated placement using stale velocity data creates suboptimal inventory distribution and stockout or overstock at specific network nodes

Storage fee accumulation for slow-moving inventory — Deliverr charges storage fees on all units in network; automated inventory replenishment without sell-through velocity monitoring creates storage fee accumulation for slow-moving SKUs; implement storage utilization and sell-through monitoring to prevent automated overshipping

Flexport freight and fulfillment integration opportunity — Deliverr under Flexport enables combined freight forwarding (international import) and last-mile fulfillment automation; automated end-to-end import-to-consumer workflow requires understanding Flexport freight API (separate from Deliverr fulfillment API) and handoff points

Returns restocking eligibility by product condition — automated returns processing at Deliverr requires pre-configured restocking eligibility criteria; returns inspected as 'sellable' are automatically restocked; returns in 'unsellable' condition require disposition instructions (destroy, donate); configure disposition rules per SKU before automated returns processing
agent_readiness.security_notes: E-commerce 3PL. SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Order, inventory, and merchant account data.

security_score_components.security_notes: E-commerce fulfillment. SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Order, inventory, and merchant data.
